select.if: SELECT PASSWORD password FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
SELECT PASSWORD password FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
SELECT ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD password FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}

update.if: UPDATE TB_GNRL_MBER SET PASSWORD = #{password} WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
UPDATE TB_EMPLYR_INFO SET PASSWORD = #{password} WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
UPDATE TB_ENTRPRS_MBER SET ENTRPRS_MBER_PASSWORD = #{password} WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}
